name: Set of 2 Ultra Dining Side Chair Cream: Chenille Upholstery, Wood Legs, Traditional Style
description:
The Ultra Dining Side Chair Set of 2 offers a simple yet elegant update to your dining room decor. Each dining chair is upholstered in a soft cream chenille fabric, for an elegant look. The charcoal gray finish on the solid wood legs creates a striking contrast with the upholstery. With its sophisticated design, this two piece dining chair set adds a traditional touch to your dining room decor. Leg assembly is required. Max weight capacity: 300 lbs.

NOTICE:
THIS ARTICLE MEETS THE FLAMMABILITY REQUIREMENTS OF CALIFORNIA BUREAU OF HOUSEHOLD GOODS AND SERVICES TECHNICAL BULLETIN 117-2013. CARE SHOULD BE EXERCISED NEAR OPEN FLAME OR WITH BURNING CIGARETTES.
The upholstery materials in this product contain NO added flame retardant chemicals.
The State of California has updated the flammability standard and determined that the fire safety requirements for this product can be met without adding flame retardant chemicals. The state has identified many flame retardant chemicals as being known to, or strongly suspected of, adversely impacting human health or development.
